UI_LootGoblin2000_Options_NotificationSo: Sound to play when a searched item is found in a nearby container.
UI_LootGoblin2000_Options_Key_Tooltip: Key to open/close the Loot Goblin 2000 panel.
UI_LootGoblin2000_Options_GrabAllKey_Too: While the Loot Goblin 2000 is open and set up for finding items, press this key to grab all found items from all nearby containers.
UI_LootGoblin2000_Options_IgnorePlayerCo: When enabled, the Loot Goblin 2000 will not look into player inventory/containers.
UI_LootGoblin2000_Options_CompactInterfa: When enabled, reduces spacing and font sizes for a more compact interface. Will be applied on new panel creation.
UI_LootGoblin2000_Options_AlwaysRootInve: When enabled, grabbed items are always placed into the character's main body inventory, regardless of which bag tab is currently selected in the inventory panel. When disabled, items go to whichever container is currently selected in the inventory UI (vanilla behaviour).
UI_LootGoblin2000_Hint: Type an item name or ID to search...
